creator: georg-bsd@schorsch-tech.de
text:
In the german bsdforen.de we noticed that basicly all people experience bad download rates. We all get redirectoed to New York Mirror.

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=225062

At least from france it is the same like from germany. We got a lot dropped tcp packages. 

It doesnt matter if we use IPv4 or IPv6.
